summary: SLA113 Iteration 17 testing complete. All NEW features working: 1) Deploy Engine with real static file hosting - deployed games are playable via live URL at /api/sla113/live/{id}/index.html, 2) Audio Forge panel extracted to AudioForgePanel.jsx with Web Audio API synthesis (Preview Sound + Export WAV buttons), 3) ArtTechNexusPanel and MatrixParamsPanel extracted to VaultAdminPanels.jsx. Backend: 14/14 tests pass. Frontend: All features verified.

minor.issue: AI audio enhancement occasionally fails with JSON parsing error (non-blocking, falls back gracefully)

issues: WebSocket connection closes before established - non-critical, metrics still load via REST

critical_code_review_comments: Deploy Engine creates instant 'live' deployments with files extracted to /app/backend/static/deploys/{id}/
Live game serve endpoint at /api/sla113/live/{deploy_id}/{file_path} correctly serves HTML, JS, JSON with proper content types
AudioForgePanel.jsx correctly imports and uses audioSynth.js functions (synthesizeFromAsset, playBuffer, stopSource, bufferToWav, downloadWav)
Web Audio API synthesis generates real audio from DSP parameters - different waveforms for sfx, ambience, foley, music_cues, stems, loops
VaultAdminPanels.jsx exports both ArtTechNexusPanel and MatrixParamsPanel as named exports
Title screen splash (4.2s) in SLA113App.jsx before main page loads - working as designed

test_credentials.note: No auth required for /sla113 - SLA113 dashboard is accessible without login

seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed projects, builds, deployments, and audio assets during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: SLA113 Iteration 17 adds: 1) Deploy Engine real hosting - POST /api/sla113/deploy creates instant 'live' deployment, GET /api/sla113/live/{id}/index.html serves playable HTML5/PixiJS game, DELETE /api/sla113/deploy/{id} cleans up files. 2) Audio Forge Web Audio API synthesis in audioSynth.js - synthesizeFromAsset() generates AudioBuffer from DSP params, playBuffer() plays it, bufferToWav() converts to WAV blob, downloadWav() triggers download. 3) Component extraction: AudioForgePanel.jsx, VaultAdminPanels.jsx (ArtTechNexusPanel + MatrixParamsPanel). Title screen shows for 4.2s before main page.

backend_api.notes: Creates deployment with status 'live' and preview_url pointing to /api/sla113/live/{id}/index.html
Serves real HTML5 game with PixiJS, proper content-type
Serves game JavaScript with GAME_CONFIG and ASSET_MANIFEST
Cleans up static files and removes deployment from DB
Generates audio asset with DSP parameters, waveform preview
Returns 5 engine params and fmodel_utility status
Creates downloadable zip with index.html, game.js, game.json

frontend_ui.notes: Title input, 6 audio types, 4 engines, DSP sliders, generate button all working
Shows waveform, Preview Sound button, Export WAV button
8 pipeline cards with color-coded tags, OS Module Functional Map table
5 engine param cards, FModel Utility Status, Compilation Readiness bar
Build select, CDN provider buttons, region buttons, Deploy to CDN button, Play Live Game link
All 4 partitions (Factory, Empire, Foundry, Vault) navigate correctly

live_game_test.notes: Real HTML5/PixiJS game loads with canvas, HUD shows game name, type, score, engine version. Interactive entities visible.

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real. Deploy Engine serves actual static files. Audio Forge uses real GPT-4o-mini for AI DSP (falls back gracefully on parse errors).
